title: Construction Wand (Fabric)
description: Unofficial Fabric Port of Construction Wand.
body:
![Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/764a52761fb5b005547c849aa8db794ef3e35a2f.png)
[![https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api](https://img.shields.io/badge/Requires_Fabric_API-white?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth&logoColor=black)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
<center>(Unofficial Fabric Port)</center>      

  
## Overview
**[Also works with Polymer!](https://modrinth.com/mod/construction-wand-polymer)**  
  
This is an unofficial port of [ConstructionWand](https://github.com/Theta-Dev/ConstructionWand) for the Fabric Mod Loader.  
No balance changes have been made, and no new items have been added.  
For a full content description refer to the original mod page.  
  
Please **report** any issues you encounter using the link in the sidebar!  

## Usage
Craft a wand and any desired cores. Apply cores by combining in a crafting grid.  
  
Open the menu with the menu key (V by default) or with `Sneak + <OPTION_KEY>` while right-clicking air.  
  
To undo, hold `Sneak + <OPTION_KEY>` while right-clicking any solid block. You will get a preview before.  

By default, `<OPTION_KEY>` is the left control key. This can be changed in the Minecraft settings starting with version 1.1.2! It is also worth noting that this key **should not** interfere with other keys, such as sprinting, despite it being highlighted in red, though I have observed that this could still happen in combination with certain other mods. In that case simply rebind it.  
For older versions you will have to open the config file `constructionwand-client.toml` and change the keycode manually.

## License
Credits go to [Theta-Dev](https://github.com/Theta-Dev/) for creating the original mod.

This project makes use of the following third-party libraries:

- [forge-config-api-port](https://modrinth.com/mod/forge-config-api-port) (MPLv2 License), to keep config compatibility between both loaders (for now)
- [Botania](https://github.com/VazkiiMods/Botania) (Custom License), for its API
- [REI](https://github.com/shedaniel/RoughlyEnoughItems) (MIT License), for its API
  
Just like the original release, this mod is licensed under the MIT license!
